post_text:
📌 FinOps for AI Systems

Nobody talks about the real cost of running AI in production 🤑.

I was wrong to think that AI cost optimization was just about monitoring a finance dashboard 📊.

It's actually a product architecture problem that requires careful design 🛠️.

Here are the key strategies to control AI cost without killing product quality:

1️⃣ Route requests to right models

4️⃣ Fallback to cheaper options

It took me years to learn that routing each request to a fit-for-purpose model tier is crucial 🚀.

Caching responses and embeddings where safe can also significantly reduce costs 📈.

Batching offline workloads for cheaper throughput is another effective strategy 📊.

Having a fallback mechanism to degrade gracefully before expensive retries is also important 🚨.

Finally, governing with budget alerts, quotas, and ownership helps prevent cost overruns 📝.

💬 Which strategy do you use to control AI cost: #DistributedSystems #ScaleEngineering #DistributedSystems #SystemDesign #DistributedSystems
